channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Issues Navigational Warning for Possible Rocket Debris from China's Long March 8A Launch
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) has advised fishermen and vessel crews in the waters around Basilan, Palawan, and Sulu to exercise caution due to potential debris from a Chinese rocket launch schedul...

item.title: Mbeere North Election Petition: Court Reviews Ballot Tampering Allegations
item.description: The High Court in Embu has heard serious claims of ballot box tampering during the Mbeere North parliamentary by-election petition. Julieta Karigi Kithumbu, the petitioner, is challenging the victory ...

item.title: The Trump-Iran conflict expands, drawing multiple countries into regional and global tensions
item.description: Two weeks into military action against Iran, the conflict initiated by the United States and Israel has broadened well beyond its original scope, involving at least 20 countries through missile strike...

item.title: India Condemns Civilian Casualties in US Missile Strike on Iranian School
item.description: India has expressed deep sorrow over the tragic loss of children in a missile attack by the United States on a girls’ school in Iran. The incident, which took place at Shajareh Tayyebeh girls’ element...

item.title: Review: 'Reminders of Him' falls flat despite Hoover's involvement
item.description: Colleen Hoover’s latest film adaptation, 'Reminders of Him', co-written by Hoover herself, has hit screens with mixed expectations but ultimately fails to impress. The romantic drama follows Kenna, pl...

item.title: Israel Claims Iran Uses Cluster Bombs Endangering Civilians Amid Conflict
item.description: As the war between Israel and Iran continues, Israeli officials have claimed that Iran is using cluster munitions, which are weapons designed to release many smaller bombs over a large area. These wea...

item.title: Montreal teen killed in drive-by shooting: lawyer argues defendant was passive passenger
item.description: In Montreal, the trial over the tragic death of 15-year-old Meriem Boundaoui continues as the defence for Aymane Bouadi presents its closing arguments. Bouadi is one of two men charged in the 2021 dri...

item.title: Man Arrested for Posing as Rideshare Driver and Assaulting Woman in Orange County
item.description: Authorities in Costa Mesa, California, arrested 43-year-old Felipe Rico-Ceballos after he allegedly lured an intoxicated woman into his vehicle under the pretense of giving her a ride home. The incide...

item.title: Brooke Nevils Reflects on Alleged Sexual Assault and Power Dynamics in Television
item.description: Brooke Nevils, a former NBC producer, has shared her experiences of alleged sexual assault by former NBC anchor Matt Lauer, recounting incidents during the 2014 Winter Olympics in Sochi and at his New...

item.title: Three Somali nationals face court for bribery and fraud at Komatipoort border
item.description: Three Somali nationals were arrested by the South African Police Service (SAPS) and Interpol National Central Bureau (NCB) in Pretoria during intensified border operations between 27 February and 11 M...

item.title: French Investors Expand into Kenya's Digital and Creative Sectors
item.description: Kenya is seeing growing interest from French investors, particularly in the digital and creative industries, as trade relations between the two countries continue to strengthen. During the launch of t...

item.title: Israeli Military Cancels Charges Against Soldiers Accused of Detainee Abuse
item.description: The Israeli military on Thursday announced the dropping of charges against five soldiers who were accused of abusing a Palestinian detainee at the Sde Teiman prison, near the Gaza Strip. The case, whi...

item.title: ADC Pledges Unity and Discipline Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don don clear say wahala and disagreement dey inside political parties, but dem no go allow any anti-party activities. This na wetin dem talk when dem unveil the ...

item.title: Key Headlines in the Philippines and World on March 12, 2026
item.description: Today’s top news highlights several developments both in the Philippines and globally. In the Middle East, tensions persist as the US and Iran show no signs of ending their conflict. Oil tankers conti...

item.title: Muhimbili Hospital Reports 100 Kidney Transplants During World Kidney Day Celebrations
item.description: On March 12, 2026, Muhimbili National Hospital (MNH) in Dar es Salaam celebrated World Kidney Day, which falls every second Thursday of March. The hospital highlighted that since 2017, 100 patients ha...

item.title: Donald Trump Raises Security Concerns Over Iran’s Participation in 2026 World Cup
item.description: US President Donald Trump don yarn say although Iran national football team fit still dey welcome for 2026 World Cup, e no too make sense make dem attend because e fit dey dangerous for dem own safety...

item.title: High Court bars NTSA from enforcing automated instant traffic fines pending full hearing
item.description: The High Court has suspended the National Transport and Safety Authority’s automated instant fines system that sends penalties to motorists via text message after alleged traffic offences. The court i...

item.title: Woman held in captivity for 25 years finally freed; perpetrator sentenced
item.description: Amanda Wixon, aged 56, has been sentenced to 13 years in prison for holding a woman, known only as 'K', captive in her Gloucestershire home for 25 years. The victim, who has learning difficulties, was...

item.title: Carlton Blues edge Richmond in tight AFL clash, regaining momentum
item.description: Carlton managed to reclaim some pride and narrative control with a narrow 75-71 win over Richmond at the MCG, following a heavy defeat to Sydney the previous week. Despite failing to score for 54 minu...

item.title: Middle East conflict causes significant global oil supply drop
item.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East has triggered the largest disruption in global oil supply in history, according to the International Energy Agency (IEA). In March, oil production is projected to de...
